sourceContext.lead: Translated and adapted from Kamigame's Charlotte guide.
sourceContext.citationText: Source page: Charlotte Guide - Star Savior | Kamigame.

hero.title: Charlotte
hero.summary: Charlotte sits in the hybrid support-DPS lane, so speed and utility substats still matter even when you upgrade into higher damage sets. From there, move into the Endgame route once the core stat line is stable.

combatIdentity.title: Combat Identity
combatIdentity.summary: Charlotte feels best once ATK%, Speed, and Crit Rate are online, giving the first rotation a much steadier payoff.
bullets: Main stats stay on Speed necklace and ATK% ring.
Substat focus: ATK%, Speed, Crit Rate, and Crit DMG.
Journey: Hard route leans toward DPS - AX5.

skillRotation.title: Skill Rotation
skillRotation.summary: Skill investment is cleanest as Special >= Ultimate >= Basic, with the first cooldown setting the pace for the full rotation.

steps.title: Open with Special
steps.detail: Lead with the highest-invested cooldown so the opener starts on the strongest possible breakpoint.

steps.title: Cash in on Ultimate
steps.detail: Ultimate is usually the next meaningful breakpoint once the opener lands and should carry the mid-cycle payoff.

steps.title: Fill with Basic
steps.detail: Use Basic between cooldowns while you keep ATK% and Speed stable on gear.

steps.title: Upgrade toward the final target
steps.detail: Budget target is 3 / 6 / 6, with 7 / 7 / 10 as the long-term skill finish.

buildPlanner.title: Build Planner
buildPlanner.summary: Start on the Budget line with Insight (4pc) + Hit (2pc) and Speed necklace and ATK% ring. Move into the Endgame route once the baseline is stable.

sets.label: Budget
sets.note: The source build leans on Effect Hit support value while keeping Charlotte fast.

sets.label: Endgame
sets.note: Swap into a harder damage shell once crit and gear quality are stable.

priorities: Substats: ATK(%), SPD, Crit Rate, Crit DMG, Effect Hit

targetStats.summary: Lock Speed necklace and ATK% ring, then stack ATK%, Speed, Crit Rate, and Crit DMG through substats.

upgradePath.title: Priority
items: Breakthrough priority: ★★☆ Strong gains from extra copies
Substat focus: ATK%, Speed, Crit Rate, and Crit DMG

journeyHard.title: Recommended Cards
journeyHard.summary: Core line: Lacy and Bunny Frey. Fill the remaining slots with Lyn Card or Bunny Claire, Charlotte, and Petra or Naru.

items.label: Passive
items.title: Unshaken Grand Master
items.summary: Charlotte's passive matters more once the core stat line is online and the rotation is already stable.

items.label: Basic
items.title: Honest Thrust
items.summary: Use the basic to bridge cooldowns; it should stay behind the two higher-impact skills in upgrade priority.

items.label: Special
items.title: Vow of Victory
items.summary: Special is the first real investment breakpoint for this build and usually defines the early payoff window.

items.label: Ultimate
items.title: Unyielding Strike
items.summary: Ultimate still helps anchor the opener, even when the build upgrades Special first.
